user.title: Sports Live — Choose Sport
user.description: Select the sport you want to follow.

mode.title: What to monitor
mode.description:
Select what kind of sensor to create for {sport}.

{features}

competition.title: Select Competition
competition.description: Choose the competition or league to monitor.

hub.title: Configure Competition Hub
hub.description: One entry for {competition} ({sport}). Choose which sensors to create and optionally track specific teams.

data.team_names: Teams to track (optional — adds next match + schedule per team)

team.title: Select Team
team.description: Choose the team to follow within this competition.

multi_team.title: Select Multiple Teams
multi_team.description: Choose the teams to monitor. One entry — one shared scoreboard fetch per cycle.

manual_team.title: Manual Team Entry
manual_team.description: Enter the ESPN team ID manually. Find the ID in the team URL on espn.com.

error.cannot_load_competitions: Could not load competitions from ESPN. Check your internet connection.
error.cannot_load_teams: Could not load teams for this competition.
error.no_teams_selected: Please select at least one team.

init.title: Sports Live Options
init.description: Tune polling frequency, match visibility window, enabled sensors, and tracked teams.

data.team_names: Tracked teams (add/remove to update per-team sensors)
